calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award Of Expungement
Off Calendar Dec-08-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: William Keith of Duckor, Spradling, Metzger & Wynne telephone number 619-209-3000 appeared by telephone for Petioner Brent Curtis Wolf.
Daniel Stone of Greenberg Glusker Fields Claman & Machtinger LLP telephone number 310-785-6872 appeared by telephone for Defendant Financial Industry Regulatory Authority.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. Petitioner Brent Wolf's petition to confirm arbitration award of expungement is granted. No opposition filed. Order and a separate judgment signed.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
